name: Action1
description: Patch management and endpoint management platform. Monitor vulnerability status, patch compliance, and device inventory.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Action1 at https://app.action1.com
2. Go to Settings → API Credentials
3. Click 'Add' to create new credentials
4. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
5. Paste both values below

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Action1 Console → Settings → API Credentials.

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Generated when you create API credentials in Action1.

checks.name: Action1 Vulnerability Management
checks.description: Verifies vulnerability scanning and tracking in Action1.

checks.name: Action1 Patch Validation
checks.description: Checks for missing patches across managed endpoints.

checks.name: Action1 Device Configuration
checks.description: Verifies device configuration policies are defined in Action1.
